variants.title: HiFi Filter SAO 7121 Engine Breather Filter
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SAO 7121 Engine Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAO 7121 Engine Breather Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SAO 7121 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: ENGINE BREATHER FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 186.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 175.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 79.5 mm, Height 1 (H1): 68.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 58.0 mm
